title: Looking for a Implementation Expert based in Sydney, Aus. For a Digital Marketing Agency
excerpt:
I’m after a Monday.com implementation expert to optimise and automate our Monday.com. 
Ideally someone that can come into the office and understand how we/each team operates.

posts.author: ivanadvisible (Ivan. T)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m after a Monday.com implementation expert to optimise and automate our Monday.com.
Ideally someone that can come into the office and understand how we/each team operates.

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ivanadvisible

We have been partnered with monday.com since 2017.

We are currently working with some of the biggest Digital Marketing Agencies and would love to give you the same support and opportunity to optimise and automate your monday.com

We specialise in building custom workflows with integrations, automations as well as a range of various apps to make your platform even more powerful.

Please book in a complimentary non obligation session here to discuss further.

We look forward to hearing from you and working together.

Kind Regards,
Cleopatra Luneburg
upstream

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @ivanadvisible,

Thanks for turning to the monday.com community while looking for some assistance. Although CarbonWeb is not located in Australia we would be happy to see how we can assist in the setup of your monday.com environment.

If you are having trouble finding a local specialist please schedule some time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started with the platform!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
